name: Waiver of False Withholding Information Penalty

eligibility.description: Individuals whose total income tax for the year (after credits) is equal to or less than their total estimated tax payments.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS may waive the $500 penalty for incorrect withholding statements if the taxpayer's actual tax liability is fully covered by credits and estimated tax payments.
